programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: The near poisoning of a wealthy socialite throws the team into a perilous investigation that puts Charlie, Rex, and even Jesse in harms way.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A young woman is abducted from the very spot her friend was murdered two years earlier; Charlie and Rex race against time as they trail the suspects from the original investigation.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Rex is on trial after his DNA is discovered at the scene of the murder of Donovan's former police informant.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex are in grave danger as they find themselves captives of a kidnapper seeking vengeance.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: An arsonist begins terrorizing a neighborhood with car bombs; Charlie and Rex race to find the next target before the case goes up in smoke.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a murder appears to mimic an infamous crime spree from the past, Charlie and Rex rush to stop the culprit from continuing a serial killer's legacy.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Crabtree bails on his marriage plans after a prophecy; Murdoch investigates the bizarre murder of two gravediggers.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch suspects Hart is lying about her father's death; Brackenreid leads a P.I. to Watts, endangering both their futures.

programme.title: Marauders
programme.desc: A group of robbers is chased by an FBI agent who uncovers a deeper conspiracy behind the robbery-homicides.

programme.title: Crypto
programme.desc: A Wall Street banker connects a small-town art gallery to a global conspiracy, putting his family in danger.

programme.title: King of Thieves
programme.desc: A famous thief pulls together a band of misfit criminals to plot the biggest bank heist in British history.

programme.title: Killshot
programme.desc: An experienced hitman and his unhinged partner target a blue-collar couple who have entered Witness Protection

programme.title: Man on a Ledge
programme.desc: A police psychologist works to talk down an ex-con who is threatening to jump from a Manhattan hotel rooftop.

programme.title: Cold Blood
programme.desc: A legendary retired hit man (Jean Reno) lives in isolation in the barren North American wilderness. When he rescues a woman from a snowmobiling accident, he soon discovers that she's harboring a secret that forces him to return to his lethal ways.

programme.title: Heathers [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Veronica (Winona Ryder) is part of the most popular clique at her high school, but she disapproves of the other girls' cruel behavior. When Veronica and her new boyfriend, J.D. (Christian Slater), confront clique leader Heather Chandler (Kim Walker) and accidentally poison her, they make it appear a suicide. Soon Veronica realizes that J.D. is intentionally killing students he does not like. She races to stop J.D. while also clashing with the clique's new leader, Heather Duke (Shannen Doherty).

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: Wanting to lead an honest life, a notorious bank robber (Liam Neeson) turns himself in, only to be double-crossed by two ruthless FBI agents.

programme.title: Gang of Roses
programme.desc: A gang of gold-hunting outlaws, headed by the ruthless Left Eye Watkins (Bobby Brown), takes over the peaceful town of Flatridge, tearing the sleepy outpost to shreds as they search for riches. They murder a can-can girl, who is the sister of Rachel (Monica Calhoun), the onetime leader of a notorious all-girl gang. Rachel then rounds up her four old associates, and they seek revenge for her sister. Using teamwork and a sassy attitude, Rachel's gang goes up against Watkins' tough crew.

programme.title: After We Collided
programme.desc: Based on the 2014 romance novel of the same name, this follows the love life of two young adults.

programme.title: Inland Empire
programme.desc: As an actress begins to adopt the persona of her character in a film, her world becomes nightmarish and surreal.

programme.title: Funny Games
programme.desc: Two violent young men take a mother, father, and son hostage in their vacation cabin and force them to play sadistic "games" with one another for their own amusement.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: A teenager learns about life, friendship and courage under the guidance of a martial arts master.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Ninja
programme.desc: SATURDAY NIGHT LIVE veteran Chris Farley stars as an orphan who was raised from infancy by the head of a ninja institute. Farley grows into an overweight young klutz who manages to become a ninja, albeit and inept one. His first assignment is not to screw up a murder investigation in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Chappie
programme.desc: Chappie tells the story of a robot imbued with artificial intelligence who is stolen by two local gangsters who want to use him for their own nefarious purposes.

programme.title: Maximum Risk
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars as retired Sergeant Major from the French army who is pulled into a murder mystery involving the death of his twin brother he never knew. Determined to learn more about his American brother, he assumes a Russian identity and travels to New York.

programme.title: The Big Heat
programme.desc: A melodrama of dice, vice and corruption. Glenn Ford stars as a rogue homicide cop who takes the law into his own hands when he sets out to smash a vicious crime syndicate and in the process finds who planted the car bomb that killed his wife.

programme.title: Born Free
programme.desc: The true story of Joy Adamson and her husband, George, who adopt a slain lioness' cubs.

programme.title: The Solid Gold Cadillac
programme.desc: A lowly stockholder exposes a big company's corrupt Board of Directors.

programme.title: The Game That Kills
programme.desc: Alec Ferguson (Charles Quigley) joins a professional hockey team to find out who was responsible for the faked rink accident that resulted in his brother's death. Rita Hayworth, in one of her first major screen roles, plays the daughter of the team's trainer.

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: It is 1942 and Norway is under the thumb of the Nazis. In a Norwegian factory, Nazis are producing "heavy water," an essential element in the production of atomic weapons. The leader of the Norwegian underground is enlisted by British intelligence to aid in destroying the factory.

programme.title: The Killing Time
programme.desc: A murderer assumes the identity of a new deputy is unbeknownst to the sheriff.

programme.title: Galaxy Of Terror
programme.desc: Neurotic astronauts (Edward Albert, Erin Moran, Ray Walston) face a giant worm and other monsters on a distant planet.

programme.title: Poolhall Junkies
programme.desc: A talented pool hustler who has stayed out of the game for years, must go back to his old ways when his little brother gets involved with his enemy, the very man who held him back from greatness.

programme.title: Karate Killer
programme.desc: Kiba is back again, but this time he has fallen from grace and sent to prison for all the violent acts he has committed. Once he's out, he begins working as a bodyguard in a club that is crawling with gangsters.

programme.title: Nightbreed: Director's Cut
programme.desc: Boone (Craig Sheffer) may be a troubled young man, but his troubles are just beginning. Set up as the fall guy in a string of slasher murders, he decides he'll hide by crossing the threshold that separates “us” from “them” and sneak into the forbidden subterranean realm of Midian. Boone will live among the monsters.

programme.title: Kick-Ass
programme.desc: Dave Lizewski makes the simple decision to become a super-hero even though he has no powers or training.

programme.title: Lord of War
programme.desc: A notorious arms dealer sells weapons to dictators and successfully outruns the law for nearly twenty years.

programme.title: Seeking Justice
programme.desc: After his wife is assaulted, a husband enlists the services of a vigilante group to help him settle the score.

programme.title: Primal
programme.desc: On a ship, an arrested assassin breaks free and releases a 400 lbs. white jaguar.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: The Wide West
programme.desc: 1907. A mysterious gambler aids a couple of Japanese sumo wrestlers, the local Judge and a beautiful store owner against ruthless outlaws who have attacked a small Californian town.

programme.title: Baby Assassins
programme.desc: Two high school girls who are about to graduate also happen to be highly-skilled assassins. When the organization that employs them orders them to share a room, their relationship turns sour.

programme.title: Baby Assassins 2
programme.desc: Chisato and Mahiro must pay four years of overdue fees or lose their membership in their assassin guild. They take part-time jobs, but find themselves in the middle of an armed robbery and being hunted by other assassins.

programme.title: Preman: The Silent Fury
programme.desc: After his son witnesses a brutal murder by a notorious crime boss, a deaf Indonesian gangster is thrust into the fight of his life when he takes on his dangerous former allies to protect his child.

programme.title: The Gangster, the Cop, the Devil
programme.desc: A vengeful crime boss forms an unlikely partnership with a detective, to catch the elusive serial killer who attacked him.

programme.title: The Perfect Roommate
programme.desc: College student Ashley invites a friend from work to move in with her.

programme.title: Murder in My House
programme.desc: A woman moves into a beautiful house in a small town with her father.

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: Following a difficult breakup in a string of failed relationships.

programme.title: My Husband's Killer Affair
programme.desc: Michelle hires a nanny, but has no idea the danger that she has put her family in.

programme.title: My Father's Murder in Greece
programme.desc: Allie must uncover long-kept family secrets.

programme.title: Lemonade Stand Romance
programme.desc: Locals and the media stand up to authorities when they shut down a girl's lemonade stand.

programme.title: Love at the Ranch
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a big-city reporter and a ranch owner as she researches the life of a romance novelist.

programme.title: Inspiring Love
programme.desc: When Isla’s art unexpectedly sells to Mark, a second commission sees them falling in love.

programme.title: The Bouquet
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters set aside their differences to help their mother save her floral business.

programme.title: Falling for the Manny
programme.desc: Alice is up for partner at her firm and hires her sister’s manny, Jacob, to help with her daughter.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: Duke Diver is living the high life as the freewheeling manager of a luxurious resort in Palm Springs, Calif. He soon faces competition from Leo, a former military man who likes the same woman that Duke is interested in. When Diver's past suddenly catches up with him, he must put aside his differences and reluctantly team up with Leo to stop whoever is trying to kill him.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: I'll Be There
programme.desc: More than a decade after distancing herself from her complicated family, Grace's carefully built life is upended when her brother AJ is diagnosed with cancer. As her estranged siblings reunite in Los Angeles, Grace is forced to confront old wounds, buried loyalties, and the role she once played in her fractured family-set against the surreal backdrop of Michael Jackson's death.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Former Marine John "Falcon" Chapman is a dark anti-hero driven by guilt and suffering from PTSD, who will destroy himself unless given something else to destroy - a useful weapon-of-last-resort for the U.S. State Department.

programme.title: Vices
programme.desc: Simone, a married woman battling anxiety and the lingering shadow of her past alcoholism, escapes to collect her thoughts. When a storm isolates her in her remote cabin, she’s hunted by two forces: the seductive pull of her past addiction, and a cunning serial killer. Surrounded by a web of lies and sin, Simone must face her inner demons before a literal one ends her life.

programme.title: Guilty Victim
programme.desc: A dangerous investor with a violent past is pulled back into chaos when a home security scheme spirals out of control, forcing him to confront old wounds, betrayal, and a brutal fight to protect what little he has left.

programme.title: Deeper
programme.desc: The story of Chasity, King, and Gotti is a tale of love, betrayal, and power. Gotti returns with a vengeance, seeking to reclaim his Dallas Kingpin status and Chasity's love. Despite their challenges, Chasity and King remain determined. As they plan their future, Gotti's secrets and power grab threaten their love. Will they triumph over his schemes or will he steal her heart? Follow their journey in the dangerous world of the hustle.

programme.title: Dr. Ira Reid: Haverford College's Unsung Scholar Activist
programme.desc: Dr. Ira De Augustine Reid, was a prominent sociologist and proficient writer who wrote on the lives of black immigrants and communities throughout the United States. Follow along his story of perseverance and relentless pursuit and how he became the first tenured African-American Faculty member of Haverford College and left a historical impact on the world of academia.

programme.title: Monster Mash
programme.desc: Dr. Frankenstein wants to meld the world's strongest monsters into a singular, unstoppable creation.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Warren's dream leads our heroes back to MERCY LABS.

programme.title: Disaster Strike Force
programme.desc: The entire California coastline is threatened as a 20.0 earthquake looms.

programme.title: A Haunting in Salem
programme.desc: The new sheriff of Salem, Mass., discovers he is cursed, and must protect his family from vengeful ghosts.

programme.title: Alien Abduction
programme.desc: Kidnapped by aliens, four friends lose consciousness. Now in a U.S. Government facility, the nightmare begins.

programme.title: Hillside Cannibals
programme.desc: A true story that inspired THE HILLS HAVE EYES of a family who lived in caves and ate the flesh of passersby.

programme.title: The Trouble With Tessa
programme.desc: Tessas suspicion that someone has been listening in on them gets confirmed. They launch a quiet investigation of their own, hoping to prove what theyre starting to fear. Their search leads to an unexpectedand increasingly personaltarget. When a set of missing car keys pushes Tessa to act, they make the dangerous choice to recover whats theirs. But what starts as a covert retrieval quickly spirals into something more ominous, as Tessa uncovers unsettling signs that someone in town may be hiding much more than stolen property. Before they can make sense of what theyve found, they find themselves trapped in a place not meant to be foundand certainly not meant to be escaped.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: As outsiders and insiders begin to gather on the island, and personal lives grow increasingly complex, the first casualties of the virus appear.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: As a state ordered pandemic commissioner takes charge of the island, cracks in the islanders' relationships begin to show.

programme.title: Tales From The Void
programme.desc: Growing up with addicts for parents, Abigail's only solace is an odd porcelain doll named Betsy. Only Betsy isn't like most dolls

programme.title: The Trouble With Tessa
programme.desc: Tessas suspicion that someone has been listening in on them gets confirmed. They launch a quiet investigation of their own, hoping to prove what theyre starting to fear. Their search leads to an unexpectedand increasingly personaltarget. When a set of missing car keys pushes Tessa to act, they make the dangerous choice to recover whats theirs. But what starts as a covert retrieval quickly spirals into something more ominous, as Tessa uncovers unsettling signs that someone in town may be hiding much more than stolen property. Before they can make sense of what theyve found, they find themselves trapped in a place not meant to be foundand certainly not meant to be escaped.

programme.title: Sand Sharks (Edited Version)
programme.desc: The residents of a small town team up to kill a group of evolved sharks that can swim in sand, terrorizing local beaches.

programme.title: Creature from the Haunted Sea
programme.desc: Heres another Roger Corman classic from the golden age of Drive-In schlock! In this spoof of horror and spy thrillers, American gangster Renzo Capetto (Anthony Carbone) decides to kill members of his bungling crew and blame their deaths on a legendary sea creature. What he doesnt know is that the creature is actually out there!

programme.title: The Changeling
programme.desc: After the death of his wife and daughter in a car crash, a music professor staying at a long-vacant Seattle mansion is dragged into a decades-old mystery by an inexplicable presence in the mansion's attic.

programme.title: Hunter Hunter
programme.desc: A mysterious predator eludes an aging detective and a cunning outdoorsman to corner and terrorize a woman and daughter trapped in a remote forest cabin.

programme.title: Infested
programme.desc: Facing an invasion of venomous spiders, residents of a suburb building will have to find their way out to survive.

programme.title: Mosquito State
programme.desc: Isolated in his austere penthouse overlooking Central Park, obsessive Wall Street data analyst Richard Boca sees ominous patterns.

programme.title: Shed, The
programme.desc: Stan and his best friend Dommer have put up with bullies their entire lives. All of that changes when Stan discovers a murderous vampire living in his shed. He knows he must destroy it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "No Place Like Home" - Back home for Christmas, Elly May bonds with her old animal friends, while Pearl plays the piano for the "new" movie in town (the silent version of Ben Hur) to impress Mr. Brewster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Home for Christmas" - Jed, Ellie May, Jethro and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Great Feud" - Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Races Jetherine" - When Sonny Drysdale promises to give Elly May a ring, Granny thinks he's going to propose and becomes a matchmaker. Cousin Pearl can't stand the idea that Elly May will get married before Jethrine, so she sets to matchmaking Jethrine with Jasper Depew.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Pygmalion and Elly" - Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's First Date" - Mr. Drysdale convinces his self-absorbed stepson Sonny to date Elly May to Mrs. Drysdale's consternation, while Granny and Jed make preparations for Thanksgiving.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro Goes to School" - Jed enrolls Jethro at an exclusive Beverly Hills elementary school. Millicent Schuyler-Potts, the proprietor of the school, is aghast when Jed and Jethro show up, convinced this is part of some ghastly hoax. After Jed says that banker Milburn Drysdale is his neighbor, she calls the banker. It turns out that Drysdale's bank holds the mortgage on the school. Schulyer-Potts suddenly warms to the charms of the Clampetts, even if it means accepting Jethro as a fifth grader.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Servants" - Ellie May starts wearing dresses but takes it as an insult when someone says she looks like a city girl. Mr. Drysdale talks Jed into taking in his butler and upstairs girl in a plan to civilize the Clampetts, but they don't quite understand the idea of servants. Miss Hathaway takes Jethro bowling and begins to show an interest in him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Trick or Treat" - Granny wants to go home because "folks is so unfriendly, no one has come to call." Jed convinces her that they should call on them, and they find that people welcome them and give them all manner of gifts when they show up on Halloween in their normal hillbilly clothes. Also, Jed works on getting Pearl to come visit while she's trying to get hitched to the oilman and find a young man for Jethrine.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Race for Queen" - Elly May competes in a contest to determine "The Queen of Beverly Hills."

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Lafe Lingers On" - Lafe Crick comes back in another scheme to get rich off the Clampetts' wealth.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Girl From Home" - A father and daughter from back home come to Beverly Hills to meet Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Giant Jackrabbit" - Granny encounters a kangaroo, and thinks she's found a giant jackrabbit, but no one will believe her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's idea for Christmas presents are ones only fit for coastal California, like diving suits and a boat, and a television set, which Granny thinks is some kind of fancy washing machine.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Culture" - The Clampetts decide to get a taste of culture to fit in the high-class society of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a rancher dies after the bank forecloses the mortgage on his property, his son blames the banker for his father's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a wealthy rancher is killed, Mark suggests that they ask a mind reader to identify the murderer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas kills a mountain man in a brawl, his father arrives in North Fork to break his other boys out of jail and take revenge on Lucas and Marshall Torrance.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Newly arrived gunslinger Al Walker throws a mammoth party at the saloon, keeping acting Marshall Ben Waller busy until Lucas is forced to intervene.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas accuses a newspaper writer's misleading articles of causing an innocent man's death, the writer begins writing articles about Lucas.

programme.desc: Gavin and Ezra Martin think that Lucas killed their son Clemmie while taking part in a train robbery and Lucas refuses to tell them what really happened.

programme.desc: Eddie's daughter causes trouble for Lucas when two strangers threaten her life after she arrives with criminal information and stolen money.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trying to protect Banker Hamilton's gold, Mark is kidnapped and held hostage at the McCain ranch and will be killed within the hour unless Lucas cooperates.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas makes a life-or-death decision when Micah is held hostage and the kidnappers demand the release of a notorious outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to do a good deed for the old town drunk but it backfires when the drunk's son believes he inherited Lucas' ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A dance hall singer asks Lucas to care for her daughter in an effort to hide the baby from her self-righteous, bigoted father.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark runs away from home after his father questions his story about overhearing a plot to rob the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous buffalo hunter tries to goad Lucas into a shooting match. When Lucas refuses, he becomes the target.

programme.title: The Stranger From Arizona
programme.desc: An action-packed, slapstick western tale which has Buck Weylan (Buck Jones) coming from Arizona to help Ann (Dorothy Fay), whose cattle are being snatched by an evil gang of rustlers. Jones mixes law and order with comedy and romance.

programme.title: The Taming Of The West
programme.desc: Bill Elliott stops the evil cattle rustlers, who use up sheriffs like disposable razor blades. Instead of the customary gun battles, Elliott was known for his fisticuffs action and so he uses his knuckles to clean out the bad guys and win the heart of Iris Meredith, who had been the main lady for Charles Starrett in his westerns.

programme.title: The Tall T
programme.desc: A stagecoach robbery lands an unwitting rancher in the middle of a standoff with a trio of ruthless thieves.

programme.title: Daring Danger
programme.desc: Tim McCoy is nearly killed in a fight with Alexander. He recovers and goes after the bad man, catching up to him and finding that he has taken up with a rustler. Of course, McCoy now has to go after the rustler, too. The film is based on a story by William Colt MacDonald.

programme.title: Unknown Valley
programme.desc: A cowboy goes into the desert to find his father, but is captured by a strange group of elders who are holding his father prisoner.

programme.title: The Shadow Riders
programme.desc: Two brothers return home at the end of the war to find their family has been kidnapped by Confederate forces.

programme.title: Fighting Caravans
programme.desc: Clint Belmet (Gary Cooper) is a frontier scout with his hands full in this 1931 Paramount Pictures version of Zane Grey's novel. He's helping guide a wagon train across the country, fighting off various attacks on the way, and falling for his lovely Felice (Lily Damita). Belmet's grizzled companions think he should leave the woman alone, but it gets lonely out on the trail, and Felice's charms are hard to resist. Featuring such notable character actors of the period as Ernest Torrence, Tully Marshall, and Fred Kolher, this vintage Hollywood Western still packs a wallop!

programme.title: Land of Hunted Men
programme.desc: A band of outlaws is terrorizing a town in the West. Leave it to Ray Crash Corrigan and his Range Busters to ride in and save the day. This film marked the return of Corrigan to the famous series; he had appeared in the first sixteen movies but left for a brief hiatus following 1942's ARIZONA STAGECOACH. This was the 21st of 24 movies in the Range Busters series. Produced between 1940-1943, the Range Busters were a huge financial success for Monogram Pictures.

programme.title: Painted Desert
programme.desc: A mightly melodrama of red-blooded action, William Boyd stars in the Pre-Code western talkie - The Painted Desert (1931). The first sound film for Hollywood heavyweight Clark Gable, The Painted Desert finds Boyd and Gable at odds over the affections of a cowboy's beautiful daughter (Helen Twelvetrees).

programme.title: Fugitive of the Plains
programme.desc: In this continuation of the much loved Billy the Kid serials featuring dreamboat Buster Crabbe (perhaps best known for his numerous appearances as Flash Gordon in the 30s and 40s), Billy finds himself joining an outlaw band led by women in order to, once again, clear his name after being wrongly accused of a crime he did not commit. Helmed by famed B-movie director Sam Newfield, this film also features Al St. John, whose lovable Fuzzy character was as essential to the PRC's Billy the Kid series as Billy himself.

programme.title: Revenge of the Virgins (Edited Version)
programme.desc: The angry and topless female members of a Native American prepare for battle when white treasure hunters move in on their sacred ground. Peter Perry Jr. (The Secret Sex Lives of Romeo and Juliet) directed this early nudie-cutie from a script by legendary cult filmmaker Ed Wood (Plan Nine from Outer Space). Writing under the pen name Peter LaRoche, Wood churned out this screenplay just before he reinvented himself as the author of seedy adult novels.

programme.title: Broadway to Cheyenne
programme.desc: A gang of big-city thugs trying to set up a protection racket out west meet their match in this B-Western from Hollywoods Poverty Row. Rex Bell, billed on the old print ads as The heroic idol of young America! stars as Breezy Kildare, a New York detective who happens to be in Wyoming. When Breezy leads a group of cattleman against the well-armed city boys, the bad guys will wish theyd stayed in New York! The rest of the cast includes such favorites from the period as George Gabby Hayes, Roy DArcy, and Marceline Day. (Day worked opposite everyone from John Wayne to Buster Keaton, but retired from acting shortly after this movie at age 25.) Directed by Harry L. Fraser.

programme.title: Raiders of the Border
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Nevada Jack McKenzie (Johnny Mack Brown) and Sandy Hopkins (Raymond Hatton) go undercover to catch jewelry smugglers in this vintage western from Monogram Pictures. This was one of the last films directed by John P. McCarthy (Song of the Gringo, The Oklahoma Cyclone), while Johnny Mack Brown would go on to find great success as Nevada Jack; this was the fourth of 19 films where he played the crime busting marshal.

programme.desc: An ex-sheriff helps protect a man framed for murder from brothers who want him dead.

programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: Monster Jam Replay
programme.desc: The roar of 12,000-pound titans descends upon the Paycom Center as Monster Jam Replay heads to Oklahoma City for Round 7 of the Arena Championship Series West. The energy is electric in "Loud City" as elite drivers face off in a high-stakes triple-threat of JCB Racing, the technical Two-Wheel Skills Challenge, and the chaotic brilliance of Freestyle. Witness a tense racing tiebreaker between Carson Williams and Ashley Sanford, and watch as Armando Castro and Tim Hall Jr. battle for critical series points. From Alex Bardin’s vertical precision in EarthShaker to Blake Granger’s powerful pursuit of a "redemption arc" in Monster Mutt Dalmatian, this episode captures the raw power and heart-pounding drama that only Monster Jam can deliver.

programme.desc: The next stage of the competition is in Bulgaria where Ervin Katona (SCL World Champion 2012) will compete for the last time.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: For the first time in over 10 years back in Estonia, in Tartu. 12 of the Strongest athletes in the world will fight here for the title and the overall world championship points. You will see 5 crazy events, such as: Boat Pull, Viking Press, Medley, Conan's Wheel and a very heavy Power Stairs!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Krzysztof Radzikowski, the leader in the league will fight hard to keep Dainis Zageris off from the title and to gather another 25 ranking points in this next stage in Latvia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The competition sees a close battle with a new world record in overhead dumbbell and close finishes throughout the day. This stage is in Croatia, in a city over 1700 years old, steeped in Roman tradition and history, the athletes arrive for the truck pull after a picturesque boat ride on the Adriatic Sea.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are now half way through the SCL 2015 and getting closer to the grand world finals in Turkey. The eighth stage is in Poland, the home country of the current leader Krzysztof Radzikowski.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this stage we go into the mountains of Austria to find out through six grueling events who is the strongest in the land of Alps. Martin Wildauer, current World Champion 2014 and Austrian local is competing alongside Zageris, Radzikowski, Belsak and many others.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The 10th stage of this year's competition in Strongman Champions League is held in the Romanian city of Sibiu where the 12 strongmen continue to compete for the title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The 11th stage is the SCL Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. In this championship, each competitor must lift three different weights overhead. Zydrunas Savickas is the current world record holder in the Log Lift.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon, Carla Hall, and Clinton Kelly welcome acclaimed Miami chef Michelle Bernstein to a special Miami Beach episode of Chewed Up filmed at the W Hotel in partnership with Experience Miami Beach. After sampling local bakery favorites including guava pastries and tequeños, the hosts celebrate Miami’s vibrant culinary scene and discuss Michelle’s lasting impact on South Florida food culture as she shares stories about her career, mentorship, and being honored during the South Beach Wine & Food Festival’s 25th anniversary celebration. Michelle then teaches the group how to make her signature Cuban sandwich empanadas, transforming the classic Miami staple into a crispy handheld pastry filled with lechón, ham, cheese, pickles, and yellow mustard. As they assemble and fry their empanadas, the conversation ranges from Cuban sandwich authenticity and Latin food traditions to family roots and restaurant life. The group also plays a lively round of “Chew It or Screw It,” debating topics such as late dinner reservations, over-tipping, flip-flops at fine dining restaurants, poolside rosé, and afternoon Cuban coffee. During Fan Mail, they answer viewer questions about cooking with candied jalapeños, discuss which decade they would most like to have grown up in, and share their favorite ways to unwind after a long day. The episode wraps with the hosts tasting Michelle’s empanadas, praising the crisp dough and balanced flavors, while Michelle shares details about her new restaurant, La Cañita. Two audience giveaways are awarded before the hosts encourage viewers to experience everything Miami Beach has to offer.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: In this episode of Chewed Up Show, hosts Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon transform rotisserie chicken into Buffalo Chicken Cornbread Melts, the grand finale of Leftover Chicken Week. Carla Hall shares her kitchen genius by combining hot sauce, butter, and shredded rotisserie chicken with a crisp celery blue cheese slaw, served on toasted cornbread rectangles. The hosts discuss ingredient swaps, blue cheese preferences, and techniques for mellowing raw onions. The episode showcases how classic wing flavors elevate simple leftovers into an elegant, less-messy alternative to traditional buffalo wings. The hosts also engage with fan mail, discussing rice rinsing preferences and brainstorming potential spin-off show concepts.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Hometown Week brings Michael Symon's roots to the Chewed Up kitchen, as he makes his grandfather Pap's potato and farmer's cheese pierogis—a dish that traces back to the heavy Eastern European influence in both Cleveland, where Michael was born, and Pittsburgh, where his parents grew up. The dough is Pap's recipe: all-purpose flour, a pinch of salt, one egg, sour cream for tenderness, and softened butter worked in for extra fat and pliability—a forgiving dough that rests in the fridge for an hour before being rolled and cut into rounds. The filling is pure simplicity: Idaho potato riced and folded with farmer's cheese in a 2:1 ratio, seasoned with chives, salt, and pepper. Michael boils the pierogis until they float, then finishes them in a pan with caramelized onions, butter, a splash of pasta water, and fresh chives—garnished tableside with sour cream. The episode's centerpiece story is the birth of Lola's famous beef cheek pierogi: when it first went on the Cleveland menu in 1997, diners balked at 'beef cheek,' and Michael sold only one or two a night. He renamed it 'pot roast pierogi,' sold 70 the next night, ran it for a year until diners were hooked, then quietly switched the name back to beef cheek. It became the restaurant's most popular appetizer by a factor of ten. Carla mentions that her nephew AJ is addicted to Michael's GoldBelly pierogis—available in potato and cheese, pork and sauerkraut, and beef cheek. The episode features three debate topics: leftovers vs. the original meal (unanimous chew it, with the exception of reheated steak and fish); the simplest dishes being the hardest to execute (cacio e pepe, French omelet, pie crust, biscuits, vanilla ice cream); and breakfast for dinner (universal love, best kept occasional—or as a late-night eggs tradition after a couple of old fashioneds). The game is Michael's Two Truths and a Lie: he slipped on butter and dropped a full tray at Lola (true); he set off a fire alarm while cooking at a friend's house (true); and he once cooked pierogis on a George Foreman Grill and melted the plastic drip tray (the lie—Clinton guesses correctly, consistent with Michael's famous contempt for George Foremans, air fryers, and microwaves). Fan mail covers: favorite cake (Clinton: carrot cake with raisins; Michael: coconut; Carla: German chocolate); what to do with canned crab (Michael: fold it into a pierogi filling or make angry crab pasta; Carla: red sauce pasta with crab); and why chefs hate tilapia (muddy flavor, overcrowded farming, general bad juju). The fan giveaway offers a monogrammed Michael Symon apron from his Frontgate collection and a copy of Simply Symon Suppers—won by Sue from Columbus, Georgia. Sponsored by FreshDirect and Front Gate.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly takes center stage for “Home Week” as he shares a deeply personal dish from his Long Island upbringing: spaghetti with white clam sauce. Drawing on childhood memories of digging for clams in the mudflats of Port Jefferson Station, Clinton walks through a simple yet flavorful recipe using fresh little neck clams, garlic-infused olive oil, white wine, and parsley. As he cooks, the hosts—Carla Hall and Michael Symon—swap stories about growing up, working in restaurants, and stepping outside their comfort zones, with Clinton reflecting on his journey from introversion to becoming a television personality. The episode balances cooking with lively debate, including a spirited discussion about oversized restaurant menus and the etiquette of bringing your own hot sauce to a meal. Michael delivers a passionate rant about seasoning, while Carla offers thoughtful insights on culinary authenticity. The trio’s chemistry shines through playful teasing and shared appreciation for food that tells a story. As the pasta comes together, Clinton emphasizes technique—like gently infusing garlic at low heat and using reserved clam juice for depth of flavor—resulting in a dish that is both accessible and impressive. The episode wraps with the hosts tasting the final product, praising its balance and simplicity. A fun game segment, “Clinton or Clam,” adds humor, followed by fan mail and a giveaway announcement featuring a signed cookbook. The show closes on a warm, communal note, celebrating food, friendship, and the stories behind every dish.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly takes the lead in the kitchen as he prepares a nostalgic Quiche Lorraine inspired by his mother, making the case for a simple yet meaningful Mother’s Day brunch made at home. As he walks through the process—layering raw onions, crispy bacon, and a rich egg-and-cream custard into a par-baked crust—Carla Hall and Michael Symon chime in with their own takes on brunch traditions, ingredient preferences, and the beauty of regional cuisine. The trio shares laughs over everything from vintage baby names to the infamous “Real Men Don’t Eat Quiche” era, using humor to dismantle outdated ideas around food and masculinity. Along the way, they highlight the importance of texture and balance, celebrating the silky, slightly jiggly custard as the hallmark of a perfectly baked quiche. A fan interaction segment adds a personal touch, with a “Fan of the Day” selected for a custom video message, reinforcing the show’s community-driven spirit. Once the quiche comes out of the oven, the hosts dig in, offering real-time reactions and thoughtful observations about flavor, technique, and versatility—debating whether quiche is best suited for brunch, lunch, or dinner. The episode wraps with a heartfelt nod to mothers everywhere and a reminder that sometimes the simplest dishes, made with care, are the most memorable.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly takes the lead in a conversation all about meal prepping and healthy breakfast habits while showing Carla Hall and Michael Symon his simple overnight oats recipe. Clinton explains how prepping breakfast the night before has helped him make smarter food choices and stay on track with his health goals, sharing that he has lost 14 pounds through portion control and calorie awareness without giving up the foods he loves. As he combines oats, oat milk, and chia seeds into mason jars, the hosts joke about everything from “wet walnuts” and frozen yogurt nostalgia to chia pets and old-school diet culture. Carla adds her perspective on whole foods and how certain ingredients help keep people full longer, while Michael balances the conversation with humor and practical advice about calories, exercise, and understanding how different foods affect the body. The discussion expands into smart scales, fitness misconceptions, and the importance of focusing on overall wellness instead of obsessing over a single number on the scale. Later in the episode, the hosts answer fan mail questions about making homemade pet food and whether they prefer performing in front of live audiences or taped studio environments, reflecting on their experiences filming at food festivals and live events. The episode wraps with the announcement of the Fan of the Day and sponsor mentions for Fresh Direct and Frontgate.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon revisits one of the most important dishes of his career as he makes his famous rotisserie chicken mac and cheese, a creamy pasta recipe that first became a hit at his Cleveland restaurant Piccolo Mondo in 1992. Using rigatoni, heavy cream, goat cheese, fresh rosemary, and shredded rotisserie chicken, Michael walks Clinton Kelly and Carla Hall through the deceptively simple recipe while sharing stories from his early days as a 22-year-old executive chef running a packed live-fire kitchen. The conversation turns nostalgic as Michael explains how the dish followed him from restaurant to restaurant and became such a customer favorite that he eventually had to remove it from the menu. The hosts laugh over Michael’s son Kyle unknowingly eating goat cheese for years despite insisting he hated it, while Clinton passionately defends rosemary after recalling a social media argument about the herb. The episode also features sponsor shout-outs to Fresh Direct and Frontgate, plus playful banter about portion sizes, “fat soup diets,” and airplane etiquette after eating rich pasta dishes. Once plated, the hosts rave about the comforting flavors, especially how the chicken melts into the creamy sauce and how the rosemary balances the tanginess of the goat cheese. The episode wraps with the selection of Melicia from New York as the “Fan of the Day,” followed by more joking between the hosts as they finish off the rich and nostalgic dish.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly leads this Chewed Up Bites episode by transforming leftover rotisserie chicken into a colorful, crunchy chicken salad inspired by the classic Chinese chicken salad popularized by Wolfgang Puck’s Chinois. As he assembles a simple sesame-lime vinaigrette and tosses together cabbage, carrots, bok choy, bell peppers, scallions, and shredded chicken, the hosts discuss the value of leftovers, pantry staples, and the difference between a salad and simply a bowl of lettuce. Michael Symon shares thoughts on menu development and simple comfort foods like peanut butter and jelly sandwiches. The conversation evolves into a broader discussion about healthy eating habits, meal planning, and the realization that not every meal needs to be an indulgent experience. Along the way, the hosts joke about Clinton’s “Gay Soup Diet,” debate the merits of themed ingredient weeks, and exchange playful banter about fashion makeovers, aging, and personal style. Sponsor shout-outs to FreshDirect and Frontgate are woven into the episode, highlighting convenient grocery delivery and entertaining essentials. A fan mail segment sparks more comedy, including the possibility of a future Gay Soup Diet cookbook. The episode wraps with the hosts sampling the finished salad, celebrating its fresh flavors and nutritional balance, before signing off with thanks to viewers and listeners.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon elevates the humble chicken tender by using a feta brine to infuse the meat with tangy, salty flavor before breading and shallow-frying to golden perfection. He finishes the dish with a bold hot honey sauce made with Calabrian chili, creating an indulgent yet sophisticated take on a crowd-pleasing classic.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall tackles a Fan Fridge from a viewer in Ohio, transforming ground beef, mashed potatoes, and pantry staples into a warming Shepherd's Pie-inspired casserole layered with sautÈed vegetables and finished with a cheesy potato topping. The hosts weave in a thoughtful conversation about grace, kindness to strangers, and the community spirit of how neighborhoods once raised children together.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon each take a third of the same chocolate sheet cake and decorate it their own way, creating three wildly different showstopping desserts in one episode. Clinton goes peanut butter, Carla goes Black Forest-inspired with sour cherry, and Michael goes coconut ganache ó proving that one bake can launch a thousand creative directions.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his beloved Mini Marsala Meatballs, mixing beef and pork with breadcrumbs soaked in milk and browning them until golden before finishing them in a rich marsala-mushroom sauce. The hosts discuss proper meatball technique, family traditions around Sunday gravy, and the surprising versatility of marsala wine in savory cooking.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly makes his beloved Tuscan White Bean Stew with chicken sausage, onions, and celery while welcoming sports broadcaster Marysol Castro ó the first female and Latina PA announcer for the New York Mets ó as a special guest. Bean Week reaches its emotional peak as the hosts discuss baseball basics, recent life milestones, and the deeply satisfying power of a vegetable-forward winter meal.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: Podcast Producer Sasha Ashall, the maestro behind the soothing sounds of the hit podcasts The Dave Chang Show and Recipe Club sits on the other side of the table for a change, as Dave cooks for Sasha.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: Dave and Chris Ying work through some of the weeks failures and successes, and works on refining the approach to the show going forward.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: It's a steaming hot day, but Dave makes a celebratory dish of tteok mandu guk, a Korean rice cake and dumpling soup for his guest, singer and actor Eric Nam. They discuss being Korean American today and how much has changed since they were young, what it is like to be Korean American in Korea, and, of course, Eric's recent stint on Traitors. Dave and Eric talk about their favorite Korean foods, how great banchan is, and why kimbap and hoe might be taking off in the future.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: The time has come. With Season 4 on the horizon, Dave and Chris are finally broaching the most-asked about topic in the history of DCS — hit TV show, The Bear. Dave and Chris start by talking Season 1. Dave asks if the pilot is one of the best TV episodes ever, the duo talk true kitchen life and what chefs really eat, and they predict which character might have the best culinary career ahead. THE BEAR IS HERE.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: We reinvent the cocktail party, with the power of live fire to take finger food over the top with rum and citrus-glazed jumbo shrimp grilled on sugarcane, “finger-burner” lamb chops from Spain and Smoked Nectarine Bellinis to keep conversation flowing. Sommelier Kristine Bocchino shares suggestions for three great wines to serve at the party.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Extending from California and the Pacific Northwest to Korea, Japan, and Southeast Asia. Explosively flavored grilled meats with exotic herbs and spices, chilies and umami-rich fish and soy sauce are paired with healthy vegetables—barbecue as health food. Vietnamese and Thai influences make the ultimate street food. Steven visits Jenee Kim for grilled beef short ribs.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Fish Hits the Fire. Steven walks you through the grilling process—from whole fish to fire-roasting shellfish. Singapore-spiced halibut grilled in banana leaves. Whole fish with Indonesian flavors by Rafael Lunetta, in Santa Monica. Alaskan salmon riffs on Russian coulibiac, with a stuffing of grilled onions, mushrooms, rice and smoke. Finally, grilling fresh oysters with Asian aromatics.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: The deep connection between wine and barbecue dates back millennia. In the Santa Ynez, grape vines are used as fuel and wine for marinades, sauces. Jidori-breed chicken breasts stuffed with ham and dry-aged cheese. Grilled flank steak with Pinot Noir mushroom sauce grilled. Chef John Cox from the Bear and Star restaurant smokes a whole bourbon-soaked wagyu strip loin.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: The perfect grilled steak, using a range of savvy grilling techniques. Leading off is a thick dry-brined New York strip with luscious anchovy crema. Tender lamb steaks come with herb-scented Moroccan Charmoula. In today’s field trip chef Curtis Stone grills an 80 day-aged rib steak over a wood fire at Gwen Butcher Shop and Restaurant in L.A.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Raichlen’s Rules. If it tastes good baked, fried, sautéed, or boiled, it tastes even better grilled. Barbecue has no limits, but it does have conventions. Look back on Steven’s secrets to successful grilling. Start with layering flavors to give your food depth. Smoke is the umami of barbecue, use it to bring new dimensions to your dishes. Finally, the grill can be used for dessert.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: So-Cal Grill. Clean bold California flavors and plenty of hot fire and wood smoke. The classic California fish taco, reimagined with wood fire-grilling. Caribbean-inspired char-grilled lobsters with orange mojo. Executive chef Anthony Endy updates the verdant South American chimichurri. Wood-grilled Castroville artichokes with charred lemon aioli bring the show to a fiery close.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Steinhatchee, Florida, with seafood-rich grilling of the Gulf Coast. Blackened redfish that we’ll prepare “on the half shell”, to the Florida shrimp boil, deconstructed and flame-charred on the grill. And, yes, there will be oysters and clams—invigorated by the sweet scent of wood smoke. Explore one of the most colorful coastal regions in North America.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: In Miami, our food culture is firmly anchored in Latin America and the West Indies. Our Miami Spice menu begins with a Project Fire first: the grilled mojito cocktail. Next comes Florida lobster grilled with rum butter baste and mango salsa, then plate-burying island spice beef plate ribs. Our grand finale? Turkey adobo with garlicky mojo de ajo.

programme.title: MIX
programme.desc: Tamee sets out to find two unique Southern California speakeasies. The super secret “The Blind Rabbit” has a hidden door just outside a Chinese Noodle shop. To get into "Lock & Key”, Tamee must find the one working door knob on a wall with over 500.

programme.title: MIX
programme.desc: Tamee heads to LA’s China Town to serve up apothecary style cocktails at “GENERAL LEE’S”. This historic bar was originally founded in 1868. Then it's off to Van Nuys CA for some beer, darts & bagpipes at the craft brewery “MACLEOD ALE BREWING COMPANY”.

programme.title: MIX
programme.desc: Tamee takes us to the corner of Hollywood & Vine to “LOST PROPERTY BAR” where you can sip on a rare whiskey take home odd items other guests have left behind! Then it’s off to the underground hot spot “THE ASSOCIATION” for old school classic cocktails.

programme.title: MIX
programme.desc: Tamee visits 2 bars in Culver City, CA that are radically different, but have something strangely in common. They both share the same address! FIN is an elegant Asian Tapas Bar/Restaurant and ALLEY LOUNGE is a upscale bar with a speakeasy vibe

programme.title: MIX

programme.desc: As the ship cruises through Scandinavia's majestic fjord lands, Lucy hits the ground running and must unexpectedly cover for her boss, Lorraine. With an incredibly busy cruise ahead, it will be a real baptism of fire for Lucy.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: In this glorious Italian city, rich in history and art, Rudy brings the Renaissance to life. We visit the great museums - the Uffizi, Bargello, and Accademia, as well as the landmarks of the Renaissance - the Duomo, Baptistry and Giotto's Tower.

programme.title: Rudy Maxa's World
programme.desc: Rudy takes you off the beaten path into the quiet, residential klongs, or canals, of Bangkok. Marvel at the Emerald Buddha, visit the city's fresh markets, join locals offering incense and flowers at colorful outdoor shrines, celebrate the king's 80th birthday with an all-night party, and more.

programme.title: Rudy Maxa's World
programme.desc: In one of his series' most colorful episodes, Maxa takes viewers along the Silk Road in a country that is an emerging economy in Central Asia, Uzbekistan. Marvel at eye-popping mosques built centuries ago, and Rudy joins a family for the preparation of the national dish of "plov."

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Rick shows viewers how three eateries translate super-fresh fish into beautifully balanced ceviches. In his Mexico City kitchen, Rick makes the case for classic ceviche. Then he dials it up notch at home with recipes for ceviches with coconut and a little booze.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Chef and Author David Sterling takes Rick on an inspiring whirlwind tour of the Yucatan peninsula, including to the rustic wood-burning ovens at Panaderia Liz in Merida. Then, it is back to the gorgeous kitchen at Los Dos Cooking School.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Rick heads for Jalisco, the place where mariachi music originated, to investigate the history and mystery of this "national soundtrack" of Mexico.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Chef Miriam Peraza and Rick tour the bustling Mercado de Lucas de Galvez in Merida before visiting the remote town of Yaxunah. At Manjarblanco restaurant, Miriam reveals her secret behind classic panuchos, sopa de lima, and queso relleno.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Rick and his daughter, Lanie, experience one of the cornerstones of Mexican cooking- Mojo de Ajo. Back home, Rick shows us how he plants, grows, and cures this flavorful garlic variety, then uses some to make a big batch of culinary gold.

programme.title: Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake - Super Simple and more
